【1vn+男全洁+全员恶人+狗血玛丽苏】
林晚芙​是集万千宠爱于一身的大小姐，她娇纵任性，要风得风，要雨得雨。
​可惜好景不长，林家破产，负债累累。
无数觊觎林晚芙美貌的人，都企图染指她，将她豢养成独属于自己的金丝雀。
这时，“爱意掠夺”系统找上了林晚芙。
从系统口中，林晚芙得知自己竟是一本豪门文里的恶毒女配。
三年前，她跟男主同父异母的哥哥狼狈为奸，仗着男主的喜欢和信任，设计陷害男主。
三年后，男主强势归来，权势滔天。
她这个落难的恶毒女配将会被自己曾经狠狠得罪过的男主强取豪夺，然后玩死。
​为了改变这种悲惨结局，林晚芙与系统达成合作，决定去招惹男主的发小，好兄弟，合作伙伴，死对头等等，获得系统的奖励。
然而，还不等林晚芙有所行动。
这些人就全都主动贴了上来，并且看她的眼神越来越不对劲……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6b0844d928b9f0f50fee07435561d5b3","author":"小西Luck","author_id":"","book_id":"7441395306068970558","book_name":"大小姐虚伪恶毒自私，可他们爱她","book_short_name":"女配但被偏爱","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#702018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":521,"name":"作精","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=521&name=作精&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":846,"name":"黑化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=846&name=黑化&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7441395428471358014","read_count":"24455","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"300502"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"141","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,系统,病娇,作精,黑化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ff8d8d387b25637aaa47c93c21ce6e62~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779302634&x-signature=G3SfDmpd34UCewzlMLFXKTleBOw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2564507442884366","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"210"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202435447D6C2EBF8FD8B913E68"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwar       [爱心][爱心]有一个是非常考虑女主的感受，就是苏御，是也是穿书者本来很厌恶女主，因为女主是恶毒女配，但是发现了女主的可爱，然后就小要帮助女主摆脱既定命运(｡･ω･｡)ﾉ♡
